MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-28-2013 IN 206, DEFENDANTS MATTHEW KECK, SOFIA KECK, AND BARBARA KECK'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/2/13 IS CONTINUED TO 6/3/13 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM AFTER THE MATTER WAS PASSED FOR PARTIES TO AGREE TO A NEW DATE. THE NEW TRIAL DATE WILL BE DEEMED TO BE THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE FOR STATUTORY CUT-OFF PURPOSES. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
